Verbena officinalis, also known as Vervain, is a perennial herb belonging to the Verbenaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate anxiety, insomnia, and other symptoms related to stress. The bioactive constituents of Verbena officinalis include verbascoside, isoverbascoside, and aucubin, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Verbena officinalis include teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used in traditional folk remedies and herbalism practices.
